steps.title: Treat the expression as one value
steps.content:
Let $u$ represent the repeated expression $5-6x$. The equation becomes:
$$11u+4=10u+22$$

steps.title: Solve for the repeated value
steps.content:
Subtract $10u$ and $4$ from both sides:
$$11u+4=10u+22$$
$$u=18$$
The repeated expression has that value.

steps.title: Select the matching choice
steps.content: The requested expression has value $18$. The answer is D.
